name: 06-secret-read
description: secret:read capability with opaque ref qualifier (env:BRAVE_SEARCH_API_KEY). Tests schema-rule's never-the-secret-value rule: qualifier carries an identifier, never the secret bytes.
notes: The secret ref format (env:<NAME>) is a convention, not enforced by schema. Other valid forms documented in schema-rule: file paths, store-specific URIs. Reeve MUST NOT emit the resolved secret value — ever. Evidence record ev-002 (sandbox-syscall getenv) captures the access event, not the returned string.
